message:
🐛 fix(leaderboard): restore Social column to show affiliate clicks, not GitHub icons (#1493)

PR #1490 changed the Social column to show GitHub profile icons for
contributors without affiliate data. This confused users because the
column is labeled "Affiliate link clicks" but showed GitHub profile
links instead. Restores the original behavior: show a dash for users
with no clicks, and the pink click-count badge for users with clicks.
GitHub profiles are already linked from the Contributor column.

Fixes #1492

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
